abilities.critical_failure: The creature takes 20d8 bludgeoning damage, is knocked prone, and is immobilized.
abilities.effect: You wave the card in the air and hurl staggering volumes of ice, snow, and rocks out into the world. This magical avalanche buries your foes. Choose up to 4 creatures within 60 feet, each of whom must attempt a Reflex save against your class DC. Regardless of their saving throw, the creature's space becomes greater difficult terrain from the mounds of ice, snow, and rubble.
abilities.failure: The creature takes 10d8 bludgeoning damage, is knocked prone, and is restrained.
abilities.name: Activate
abilities.success: The creature takes 5d8 bludgeoning damage and is pushed into an adjacent space of its choice.

stat_block.text: *The Avalanche* represents unmitigated disasters, destruction that overruns all in its path. As long as *The Avalanche* is invested, you gain a +1 item bonus to damage rolls with Strikes that inflict bludgeoning damage. This increases to a +2 item bonus if you're at least 14th level, and a +3 item bonus if you're at least 18th level.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Artifact
traits.text: Items with this trait are artifacts. These magic items can't be crafted by normal means, and they can't be damaged by normal means. Artifacts are always rare or unique.

traits.name: Evocation
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the evocation school of magic, typically involving energy and elemental forces.

traits.name: Invested
traits.text: A character can invest only 10 magical items that have the invested trait. None of the magical effects of the item apply if the character hasn’t invested it, nor can it be activated, though the character still gains any normal benefits from wearing the physical item (like a hat keeping rain off their head).

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.
